title: Fresh Creamy Venezuelan Beef Kidney Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring tender beef kidney in a rich and creamy sauce, perfect for special occasions. This dish is a staple of Venezuelan cuisine, with a blend of spices and herbs that will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef kidney and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and chopped red bell pepper, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, beef broth, heavy cream, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef kidney is tender.
Use two forks to shred the beef kidney into bite-sized pieces.
Continue to simmer the stew for an additional 30 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
